name: 多角度网格图
description: 一个产品从多个角度拍摄，以 2×2 或 1×4 网格排列

defaults.lighting: uniform studio lighting across all angles

prompt_template.subject: grid layout showing {product_description} from four angles: front view, three-quarter view, side view, detail view

overrides.composition: 2x2 grid, four distinct product angles, equal cell size, thin borders
horizontal row of 4 progressive angles, consistent scale across frames
grid showing product in 4 different color variants, same angle
